title: azure-kv put: raw local String not Zeroizing, gap undocumented
description: Trigger: any put() call on the Azure KV backend. In put(), 'let raw = std::str::from_utf8(...).map(str::to_owned)' creates a plain String holding the secret. str::to_owned() allocates without Zeroizing. The String is passed to SetSecretParameters and dropped without zeroing after the API call. vault and gcp-sm document this class of gap; azure-kv has no module-level # Zeroization section at all. Fix: add a # Zeroization section documenting that put produces one plain String copy of the secret that is not zeroed.
